items.name: Ralph Lauren Wimbledon Letterman Jacket
items.description: Part of our collection celebrating Wimbledon 2024, this cotton jacket pays tribute to the world's oldest tennis tournament with chain-stitched embroidery and appliqués. It also features our signature "P" patch on the left chest for a letterman-style look.
